effects.description: Concrete sound-effect placements for the scene. Each entry is an object with EXACTLY these field names: 'name' (effect id from the catalog), 'time' (start time in seconds — NOT named 'start'), 'volume_level' (the enum 'LOW'|'MEDIUM'|'HIGH' — NOT a 0..1 float and NOT named 'volume'). Optional 'duration' is in seconds.

name.description: Identifier of the sound effect from the available_effects catalog (e.g. 'floor_creak', 'wind_gust').

time.description: Placement time in seconds from the start of the scene audio. Field name is 'time', NOT 'start' or 'start_time'.

volume_level.description: Categorical volume level. Must be one of the enum values 'LOW', 'MEDIUM', 'HIGH'. Field name is 'volume_level' (NOT 'volume'); the value is the enum string (NOT a 0..1 float).

duration.description: Optional duration of the effect in seconds (omit if the catalog default should be used).

suggested_effects.description: Optional list of effect ideas not present in the catalog that the designer recommends sourcing. Each entry is an object with a 'description' string key.

description.description: Free-form description of a suggested sound effect (e.g. 'low brass swell as the door opens').
